title: ultraDocumentBody
body:
BEL Employability Module 

As a student in the Business, Economics and Law (BEL) faculty, you have exclusive access to a dedicated team of Careers and Employability specialists, and a varied program of workshops, industry presentations, networking events and other opportunities to discover your career pathway and build your employability. This Employability module provides you with easy access to a wide range of resources and opportunities to prepare for your career after graduation. 


If you are enrolled in a non-BEL degree program, please connect with your faculty's student experience, enrichment or advisory team. 


How to use this module 

Please access the below Employability module with a nickname or alias of your choice. This allows us to measure student engagement with the tab in a de-identified manner. 

The module has four main sections, as well as information on how to navigate it and a glossary of relevant terms:  

Welcome to BEL Careers & Employability 

  1. Get Application Ready 
  2. Build your Experience 
  3. Other Resources 

The module provides direct links to a wide range of services and resources. Check back in regularly to explore what is available and to ensure you don’t miss anything important. 


For any questions or comments, please contact us at careers@bel.uq.edu.au.
